issues.title: Harness fails with ENOENT on _runner_file_commands/set_output_* after agent succeeds — 24 pure-harness failures + 9 compound
issues.detail: 37 runs hit `ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/runner/work/_temp/_runner_file_commands/set_output_<uuid>'` in copilot-harness. 24 had agent exitCode=0 (pure harness bug masking success), 9 were compound with model errors. Affected workflows: PR Sous Chef (6), PR Code Quality Reviewer (5), Matt Pocock Skills Reviewer (4), Test Quality Sentinel (4), Smoke CI (3), Auto-Triage, Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer, Issue Monster, Linter Miner, Daily Secrets, GEO Optimizer, PR Triage, PR Description Updater, Contribution Check, Daily Testify, Daily Safe Output Integrator, Daily Model Inventory.

issues.title: Copilot CLI 1.0.48 sends rejected `anthropic-beta: context-1m-2025-08-07` header (CAPIError 400)
issues.detail: 17 runs saw `CAPIError: 400 Unexpected value(s) context-1m-2025-08-07 for the anthropic-beta header`. 14 failed outright, 3 succeeded after retry. Affected: Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer, PR Code Quality Reviewer, PR Description Updater, Auto-Triage Issues, Daily Model Inventory, Linter Miner, PR Triage, Contribution Check, Daily Team Evolution Insights. Root cause: copilot/pkg/linux-x64/1.0.48/app.js attaches Claude 1M context beta header. CAPI/proxy rejects it.

issues.title: Codex engine continues to fail — model gpt-5.5 invalid (3 of 4 today)
issues.detail: AI Moderator (×2) + Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer all failed with same gpt-5.5 400 Bad Request. 4th codex run completed. Yesterday's fix attempt still not landed.

issues.title: Daily News (copilot): `Copilot CLI requires Node.js, but 'node' is not available inside AWF chroot`
issues.detail: Exit code 127. Chroot bind-mount path missing Node.js install. Single-workflow regression but blocks the daily news generator.

issues.title: Design Decision Gate hit 20-turn ceiling — permission denials on git commit/fetch
issues.detail: Claude agent reached max 20 turns ($1.35, 1.3M tokens). Two permission denials: git commit ADR file, git fetch PR head branch. Suggests workflow trying to write but tool not permitted.

issues.title: Smoke CI cancellations — 3 of 11 today
issues.detail: Runs 26341182074, 26340502327, 26338770313 cancelled around 2m wall. Same pattern persists 5 days.

issues.title: 594 blocked requests across (unknown) domains — 15% of 3933 total
issues.detail: Auto-Triage Issues had 32% block rate (10/31). The (unknown) bucket dominates, suggesting raw-IP egress or DNS-resolution failures. Compare with yesterday's 385 blocked of 2108.

issues.title: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $5.55 — 23% of daily spend (was 43% yesterday)
issues.detail: Decreased from $8.54 yesterday. Still single most expensive workflow at 7.5M tokens / 18 min.

issues.title: Deployment Incident Monitor: 2 runs cancelled in 1.0s
issues.detail: Both deployment_status-triggered runs cancelled near-instantly. Likely event filter or pre-check rejects.

issues.title: PR Sous Chef execution drift — 6-52 turns (avg 20.8)
issues.detail: Persistent — flagged by observability insight: 60% failure rate driven by ENOENT but turn variance remains.
